property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\Administrator\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg0rkv61g;C:\Program Files\Graphviz\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NetSarang\Xshell 8\;C:\Program Files\Go\bin;C:\ProgramData\anaconda3;C:\ProgramData\anaconda3\scripts;C:\ProgramData\anaconda3\library\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Tencent\微信web开发者工具\dll;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\phpcli;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\WINDOWS\system32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32\config\systemprofile\go\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\GoLand 2024.3.2.1\bin;;C:\WINDOWS\system32\config\systemprofile\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PhpStorm 2025.1.3\bin;;C:\Program Files\Lens\resources\cli\bin;C:\Users\Administrator\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.11-bin\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Enterprise\VC\Tools\MSVC\14.44.35207\bin\Hostx64\x64;C:\Library\SDL2;C:\Library\SDL2\lib\x64;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Programs\Qoder\bin;C:\Users\Administrator\go\bin;C:\Users\Administrator\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;c:\Users\Administrator\.vscode\extensions\openai.chatgpt-0.4.79-win32-x64\bin\windows-x86_64;.

testcase.name: attemptUpsert_shouldThrowWhenMapperWriteFails
testcase.system-err: 3月 01, 2026 8:31:15 下午 com.cuzz.rookiefortunetree.repository.FortuneTreeAttemptRepository upsert 严重: [FortuneTree] Failed to upsert attempt record. java.lang.RuntimeException:
